trivia_bullets.text: Consuming Sinkhole is one of a small number of OGW devoid spells (non-creature) that use the {C} colorless mana symbol. As a modal instant with devoid, it represents the Eldrazi's environmental transformation of Zendikar — the plane's living landscape (land creatures like Oran-Rief Hydra in its land-creature mode) was a literal target for Eldrazi consumption. [Scryfall oracle_text, Wizards OGW Mechanics article]

Flavor text: "What will not yield will be consumed." — Ayli, high priest of the Eternal Pilgrims. [Scryfall] Ayli is a Kor cleric whose cult, the Eternal Pilgrims, came to worship the Eldrazi as gods — believing them to be the divine beings underlying the Kor's ancient sky-deity traditions. Her quote here is not defiance but acceptance: surrender as doctrine. [WebSearch: mtg.fandom.com/wiki/Ayli snippet]

The modal structure — exile a land creature OR deal 4 damage to a player/planeswalker — is unusually wide for a common at 4 mana. The land-creature mode was narrow in Standard but made the card relevant against Zendikar's creature-lands (Lumbering Falls, Hissing Quagmire). Pauper-legal. EDHREC rank 27490. [Scryfall]
